gold_change_reason: Added sorting of reactions/compounds, clamping of negative lower bounds to 0, and missing bounds check to meet scaled task requirements.
covered_requirements: Increase data complexity by enlarging the model and adding extra attributes that the function should ignore.
Add constraint that irreversible reactions must have non-negative lower bound for flux variable.
Ensure the function raises an error when a reaction is missing bounds.
Add multiple executable test cases covering normal, edge, and adversarial scenarios to strengthen verification.
implementation_notes: Reactions and compounds are sorted alphabetically to ensure deterministic ordering.
Flux variable lower bound is clamped to 0 if negative to enforce irreversibility.
Function raises ValueError if any reaction lacks bounds in limits dictionary.
Extra attributes on model are ignored as they are not accessed.
